name: I.C.P. Israel Citrus Plantations Ltd.
summary: I.C.P. Israel Citrus Plantations Ltd. engages in agriculture and properties rental businesses in Israel. It operates through two segments, Agriculture and Investment Property. The company delivers various agricultural services, which include planting orchards; and maintenance and processing, including fertilization, irrigation, pest control and spraying, fruit orchard species replacement, harvest management, and orchard management. It is also involved in the development, leasing, and management of land and buildings. The company was incorporated in 1958 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel. I.C.P. Israel Citrus Plantations Ltd. is a subsidiary of A. Ben-Ezer and Sons Ltd.
